questions.question: Explain the concept of Artificial Intelligence (AI) and its significance in the field of computer science. (5 marks)
questions.hint: Provide a detailed explanation of the concept of AI and its importance

questions.question: What is the difference between Narrow or Weak AI and General or Strong AI? Provide an example to support your answer. (5 marks)
questions.hint: Describe the key characteristics of each type of AI and provide a concrete example to illustrate the difference

questions.question: Describe the process by which AI systems learn from data and improve their performance over time. (5 marks)
questions.hint: Explain the key concepts involved in machine learning and provide a brief overview of the training process
